name: OG Image CN
description: Beautiful OG images, made simple. Ready to use, customizable Open Graph image components for React.
descriptionLong: OG Image CN is a shadcn-compatible registry of Open Graph image components for React. Install via the CLI, customize templates in your codebase, and ship social preview images without a separate design tool.
features: shadcn CLI install — components live in your repo
Built for React and Next.js metadata APIs
